name: sabai-remotion
description: Video creation assistant — generates Remotion components and renders MP4 videos with GIF previews.

default_format.description: Preferred video format (for example landscape-16:9, portrait-9:16, or square-1:1)

default_fps.description: Preferred frames per second for new compositions

default_duration_seconds.description: Default target duration for new videos in seconds

brand_voice.description: Preferred tone for scripts and on-screen copy
